prompt: Create a polished semi-realistic anime-style corporate portrait of a confident young businessman standing in a modern high-rise office, shown from mid-thigh to head, positioned slightly left of center with arms crossed. He wears a tailored dark navy blue business suit, crisp white dress shirt, dark blue tie, white pocket square, and buttoned cuffs; his build is slim-athletic and professional. His hair is short, wavy, neatly styled, and black with subtle blue highlights. Obscure the entire face with a centered flat square censor block in a smooth beige skin-tone gradient, covering forehead through chin while leaving hair, ears, neck, suit, and posture visible. The background is a bright glass-walled executive office with floor-to-ceiling windows, a sunlit modern city skyline outside, soft blue sky, faint clouds, a small potted plant and office furniture at the lower left, and a pale futuristic digital interface overlay on the right side with thin white lines, hexagons, dotted grids, and abstract network geometry. Use cinematic morning light, soft lens flare, cool blue-white color grading, high-detail anime illustration rendering, clean linework, realistic fabric folds, glossy window reflections, and a professional tech-business atmosphere. Wide 16:9 composition, leave open negative space on the right for potential text, no visible writing, no watermark.
